---
title: "Course Schedule"
description: "Weekly schedule for the GEOG 279 course."
---

[Course Syllabus](syllabus/GEOG279_Syllabus_Fall_24.pdf)

<div id="course-schedule">

| **Week** | **Day**  | **Topic**                                   | **Readings**                                                                                                                                                                  | **Slides** | **Due dates**       |
|----------|----------|---------------------------------------------|-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------|------------|---------------------|
| 0        | Thursday | Why causal analysis?                        |                                                                                                                                                                               | [Why causal analysis? Slides](slides/Intro_to_causality.pptx) |                     |
| 1        | Tuesday  | Potential outcomes framework                | [Ferraro et al., 2018](https://www.pnas.org/doi/full/10.1073/pnas.1805563115) <br> <span style="color: gray; font-style: italic;">Skim: [Holland, P.W. (1986)](https://doi.org/10.2307/2289064), "Statistics and Causal Inference."</span> | [The Challenge of Impact Assessment Slides](slides/1B - The Challenge of Impact Assessment.pptx) |                     |
| 1        | Thursday | Causal Diagrams                             | [Brodie, J.F., et al. (2023)](https://www.nature.com/articles/s41586-023-06410-z) <br>[The Effect Book](https://theeffectbook.net/index.html) (**ch6 & 7**)                    | [DAG Slides](slides/Directed_Acyclic_Graph_(DAG).pptx) |                     |
| 2        | Tuesday  | Causal Diagrams                             | [The Effect Book](https://theeffectbook.net/index.html) (**ch6 & 7**)                                                                                                         |            |                     |
| 2        | Thursday | <span style="color: red;">**No Class**</span> |                                                                                                                                                                               |            |                     |
| 3        | Tuesday  | Randomized Control Trials (RCT)             | [Impact Evaluation in Practice](books/impact_eval_book.pdf) (**ch4,p63-86**)                                                                                                  | [Randomized Control Trials Slides](slides/2A - Randomized Control Trials.pptx) | **Assignment 1 due, Oct. 14th** |
| 3        | Thursday | Randomized Control Trials (RCT) and Power Calculations | [Impact Evaluation in Practice](books/impact_eval_book.pdf) (**ch15,p261-287**)                                                                                               |            |                     |
| 4        | Tuesday  | Matching and Synthetic Controls             | [Honey-Rosés, J., et al. (2011)](https://conbio.onlinelibrary.wiley.com/doi/10.1111/j.1523-1739.2011.01729.x) <br> <span style="color: gray; font-style: italic;">Skim: [Rubin, D. B. (1974)](journals/1975-06502-001.pdf)</span> | [Matching Estimators Slides](slides/2B - Matching Estimators.pptx) |                     |
| 4        | Thursday | Matching and Synthetic Controls             | [Abadie, A., Diamond, A., & Hainmueller, J. (2012)](https://www.tandfonline.com/doi/citedby/10.1198/jasa.2009.ap08746?scroll=top&needAccess=true)                             | [Synthetic Controls Slides](slides/Synthetic Controls.pptx) | **Assignment 2 due, Oct. 28th** |
| 5        | Tuesday  | Differences-in-Differences (DID)            | [Wauchope HS, Jones JPG, et al. (2022)](https://pubmed.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/35444280/)                                                                                            | [Difference-in-Differences Slides](slides/3A - Difference-in-Differences.pptx) |                     |
| 5        | Thursday | Staggered Roll-out                          | [Roth, J., Sant’Anna, P.H.C., Bilinski, A., Poe, J. (2023)](https://doi.org/10.1016/j.jeconom.2023.03.008)                                                                   | [New DiD Slides](slides/New DiD.pptx) |                     |
| 6        | Tuesday  | Instrumental Variables (IV)                 | [Mellon, 2024](https://doi.org/10.1111/ajps.12894)                                                                                                                            | [IV Slides](slides/3B - Instrumental Variables.pptx) |                     |
| 6        | Thursday | Regression Discontinuity Design             | [Noack, F., Larsen, A., Kamp, J., & Levers, C. (2022)](https://onlinelibrary.wiley.com/doi/full/10.1111/ajae.12274)                                                           | [RDD Slides](slides/4A RDD.pdf) | **Assignment 3 due, Nov 11th** |
| 7        | Tuesday  | Standard errors and spatial considerations  |                                                                                                                                                                               |            |                     |
| 7        | Thursday | Standard errors and spatial considerations  |                                                                                                                                                                               |            |                     |
| 8        | Tuesday  | Special considerations when using remote sensing | [Proctor, J., Carleton, T., Sum, S. (2023)](https://www.nber.org/papers/w30861) <br> [Proctor, J., Carleton, T. Slides](slides/Proctor, Carleton and Sum.pptx)                  | [Spatial Causal Slides](slides/Spatial causal.pptx) |                     |
| 8        | Thursday | Machine learning for causal inference       | [Baylis, K., Heckelei, T., Storm, H. (2021)](https://doi.org/10.1016/bs.hesagr.2021.10.007) <br> [Avelino et al. 2016, Goldilocks and the Raster Grid](journals/Avelino et al 2016 Goldilocks and the Raster Grid.pdf) | [ML in Causal Analysis Part I Slides](https://docs.google.com/presentation/d/1DSut2pG6LBtBYhNHDiewveYdyzx3dagcj7lQVdCt1lw/edit?usp=sharing) [![Open In Colab](https://colab.research.google.com/assets/colab-badge.svg)](https://colab.research.google.com/github/agpo-ilr-uni-bonn/PromotionskollegModule6800_2024/blob/master/6800_Day1.ipynb) | **Assignment 4 due, Nov 25th** |
| 9        | Tuesday  | Machine learning for causal inference       |                                                                                                                                                                               | [ML in Causal Analysis Part II Slides](https://docs.google.com/presentation/d/1LPo1IFZNeWcr2La1jGVOnred3IbmSePWlE6GA_l3EsU/edit?usp=sharing) [![Open In Colab](https://colab.research.google.com/assets/colab-badge.svg)](https://colab.research.google.com/github/agpo-ilr-uni-bonn/PromotionskollegModule6800_2024/blob/master/6800_Day4_5.ipynb) |                     |
| 9        | Thursday | <span style="color: red;">**Thanksgiving :)**</span> |                                                                                                                                                                               |            |                     |
| 10       | Tuesday  | Final Presentations                         | -                                                                                                                                                                             |            |                     |
| 10       | Thursday | Final Presentations                         | -                                                                                                                                                                             |            | **Papers due, Dec 10th** |

</div>
